heading: Purchases of tree seeds, cones, forage plant seed, and nursery stock for national forests
label: 504 Purchases of tree seeds, cones, forage plant seed, and nursery stock for national forests
text: The provisions of shall not apply to any purchase by the Forest Service of forest-tree seed or cones or of forage plant seed when the amount involved does not exceed $10,000, nor to any purchase of forest-tree nursery stock when the amount involved does not exceed $500, whenever, in the discretion of the Secretary of Agriculture, such method is in the public interest.section 6101 of title 41
notes: CodificationIn text, “” substituted for “section 3709, Revised Statutes (),” on authority of , , , which Act enacted Title 41, Public Contracts.section 6101 of title 4141 U.S.C. 5Pub. L. 111–350, § 6(c)124 Stat. 3854Jan. 4, 2011
Amendments1950—Act , increased open market purchase limitation from $500 to $10,000 on forest-tree seed or cones or forage plant seed.Apr. 24, 1950
